_comment: Large world-map binaries used to be tracked in Git LFS, whose free bandwidth (1 GB/mo, shared org-wide) was exhausted by a handful of installs. They now live as assets on a GitHub Release, whose download bandwidth is free and unmetered. scripts/fetch-map-assets.mjs reads this manifest and downloads any listed file that is missing or out of date; the launcher and updater call it instead of touching Git LFS. When a map file changes: upload the new asset to the release below and update its sha256 + bytes here.
